drive_file_searches.finding: Drive returned the War Room spreadsheet/workbook copies and the grant operating log. These are planning records, not a signed Swiss implementation partner, partner budget, research-institute/waiver, or commitment letter.
Drive returned the War Room spreadsheet/workbook copies. No Innosuisse partner, Swiss project budget, or acceptance/waiver evidence was found.
No Drive result for ETH Zurich.

Drive returned research notes and skill/tooling files. No eligible public-sector research organisation lead, owned knowledge asset, IP rights evidence, senior support letter, or Aureon procurement/support role evidence was found.

Drive returned Invest NI planning material, the War Room, unrelated investment/skill files, and workbook copies. No DRIVE35 co-investment, ZEV facility, Tier 1 partner, match funding, or eligible budget evidence was found.

Drive returned unrelated technical docs and Atlantic research drafts. No maritime lead, vessel/port/infrastructure asset, permit, insurance, shipyard route, three-year demonstration commitment, or eligible budget evidence was found.

Drive returned the War Room spreadsheet/workbook copies and a master work index. These do not prove a quantum hardware lead, hardware/facility access, consortium commitment, partner budget, or validation plan.

Drive returned the War Room files and the RA Grant War Room package. This route is repayable finance, not a grant, and the search did not confirm action-time approval, repayment capacity evidence, loan amount, cash-flow forecast, or credit-risk pack.

war_room_sheet_searches.finding: Funding Pipeline row 12 records UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3 and the need to build a Swiss partner target list and one-page pitch. It does not include signed partner, budget, waiver, or commitment evidence.
Partner Map row 12 says a Swiss implementation partner is required and to build a target list. It is not a named committed partner.
No Swiss evidence row found in Evidence Register search range A1:Z1000.
No CKAF row found in Funding Pipeline search range A1:Z1000.
No knowledge asset evidence row found in Evidence Register search range A1:Z1000.
No public-sector research organisation lead row found in Partner Map search range A1:Z1000.
No DRIVE35 row found in Funding Pipeline search range A1:Z1000.
No Tier 1 automotive partner row found in Partner Map search range A1:Z1000.
No ZEV facility, partner, or co-investment evidence row found in Evidence Register search range A1:Z1000.
No automotive lead, vehicle manufacturer, or Tier 1 partner row found in Partner Map search range A1:Z1000.
No ZEVI row found in Funding Pipeline search range A1:Z1000.
No maritime lead, port, vessel owner, or infrastructure owner row found in Partner Map search range A1:Z1000.
No vessel or maritime infrastructure evidence row found in Evidence Register search range A1:Z1000.

Funding Pipeline rows 23-25 list quantum route ideas and explicitly frame the hardware CR&D route as weak without a quantum hardware/software partner. They do not include hardware access, consortium, or budget evidence.
Partner Map row 5 lists Queen's University Belfast as an academic validation/EPSRC lead target. It is a target, not a committed quantum hardware lead or facility.
No hardware facility, hardware access, or quantum partner evidence row found in Evidence Register search range A1:Z1000.

Funding Pipeline row 27 states the loans route is not a grant and should be considered only after revenue/traction and UKDI suitability call. It does not provide repayment-capacity or action-time approval evidence.
No loan approval, repayment capacity, cash-flow forecast, or credit-risk evidence row found in Evidence Register search range A1:Z1000.
No UK-Switzerland tracker row found in Application Tracker search range A1:Z1000.
Application Tracker row 10 records academic partner outreach as not started and needed for EPSRC/quantum/hardware routes. It confirms the gap rather than unlocking submission.
No maritime tracker row found in Application Tracker search range A1:Z1000.

route_impacts.impact: Drive and War Room readback confirmed route planning only. No Swiss implementation partner, research-institute/waiver, partner commitment letter, partner budget, permit/export position, or finance evidence was found.

Drive and War Room readback did not confirm an eligible public-sector research organisation lead, owned knowledge asset, IP rights evidence, senior support letter, or authorised Aureon support/procurement role.
Drive and War Room readback did not confirm a vehicle manufacturer or Tier 1 partner, ZEV work package, match funding, partner budget, eligible budget, or consortium role.
Drive and War Room readback did not confirm a ZEV manufacturing facility/site, co-investment, GBP5m-plus project cost basis, capital investment plan, or delivery capacity.

Drive and War Room readback did not confirm a UK maritime lead, alternative-fuel vessel or infrastructure asset, three-year demonstration commitment, eligible budget, permit, insurance, or site evidence.

Drive and War Room readback did not confirm a UK maritime lead, electric-power vessel or infrastructure asset, three-year demonstration commitment, eligible budget, permit, insurance, or site evidence.
Drive and War Room readback did not confirm a UK maritime lead, vessel/infrastructure asset, three-year demonstration commitment, eligible budget, permit, insurance, or site evidence.

Drive and War Room readback found quantum route planning notes and outreach targets only. No eligible quantum hardware lead, hardware/facility access, consortium commitment, partner budget, or validation plan was found.

Drive and War Room readback confirms the loan route remains repayable finance, not a grant. No action-time approval, repayment capacity, cash-flow forecast, loan amount, credit-risk pack, or deliberate loan approval was found.

controls: Google Drive and Google Sheets were read only.
Planning packs, War Room rows, outreach targets, and research files are not treated as signed/dated lead, partner, budget, facility, asset, or commitment evidence.
No Drive file or Sheet cell was created, modified, moved, shared, uploaded, or downloaded as raw private evidence.
Private finance and repayable-loan material was not copied into the artifact.
No IFS portal page was changed and no external action was performed.
No route was marked submit-ready from planning logs, target rows, unrelated files, or non-grant loan watch rows.
